preview.summary: Top-ranked France open their campaign against Africa's standard-bearers Senegal in a Group I heavyweight clash. Deschamps' attacking talent meets a Senegal side built on physical power and big-game pedigree, with both expected to push for the knockouts.
preview.homeForm: France enter as the world's No. 1 ranked side, loaded with attacking depth and among the tournament favourites.
preview.awayForm: Senegal, ranked 14th, qualified unbeaten atop their African group and arrive as arguably the continent's strongest team.
preview.homeKey: Kylian Mbappe: captain and talisman chasing World Cup goal records.
preview.awayKey: Sadio Mane: experienced talisman in his farewell international tournament.
storylines: Rematch of the 2002 shock when Senegal beat France on debut
Mbappe leads France's loaded forward line
Mane plays his final international tournament before retirement
preview.h2h: Their only senior meeting was Senegal's famous 1-0 win over reigning champions France at the 2002 World Cup.
